verdict.note: Blocked by a PRE-EXISTING crash unrelated to this change. The status-colour code is in place (m-sess-status now reads the shared STATUS_COLOR map, mirroring the verified desktop surfaces), but the mobile surface cannot be reached live: on a sub-640px viewport MobileApp renders the default Specs tab, whose MobileNode to SpecPane path throws (Cannot read properties of undefined reading split, NodeView.jsx line 48, an undefined spec body) and blanks the app before the Sessions tab is reachable. Reproduced identically on MAIN (port 5173, unmodified), so it predates and is independent of the status-colour change. Desktop status-colour is filed pass with live evidence; mobile visual confirmation awaits a fix of the MobileNode crash.
